name: Tatsuya
description: A berserker who has been a member of the Hero Squad longer than anyone else. Because he has been resurrected as a hero so many times, he has lost his sense of self and the ability to think, and is unable to speak. His true identity and everything else about him are shrouded in mystery. His close combat abilities are monstrous, and he wields a giant battle axe as easily as a kitchen knife.
mediaTitles: Sentenced to Be a Hero: The Prison Records of Penal Hero Unit 9004
searchTerms: Sentenced to Be a Hero: The Prison Records of Penal Hero Unit 9004

name: Tetora Bouhatei
description: A ponytailed girl with purple hair who is a lucky girl and leads a carefree life. The author introduces her as the true protagonist of the manga. Her name is a pun on bouhatei ("breakwater") and Tetrapod.

name: Theo
description: __Height:__ 189cm A local doctor who regularly uses Benriya's services. He is missing two fingers on his left hand.

name: Tsubasa Shibahime
description: Tsubasa Shibahime is a girl who loved Soichiro Arima ever since they attended middle school together. Although she studied hard so she could attend Hokuei High School with Soichiro, a bad skateboarding accident prevents her from starting school with everyone else.
mediaTitles: Kare Kano: His and Her Circumstances
searchTerms: Kare Kano: His and Her Circumstances

name: Vitalis
description: The owner of the dogs and the head of the Vitalis Troupe.

name: Yomikawa Senpai
description: Likes to read. Can't carry anything heavier than a book even though she is on a hole-digging club.

name: Yukari Sakuragi
description: Yukari Sakuragi is one the class officers, the other being Kazami, of Yomiyama North Middle School's 9th grade class. ~!After hearing an important message from a teacher, she takes her umbrella and runs out of the classroom. After seeing Sakakibara with Misaki standing in the hallway she runs to the opposite direction. She runs downstairs and slips. Her umbrella falls out of her hand and she falls on it with her throat being pierced by the iron point of her umbrella and dies a few seconds later.

name: Yuki
description: A beautiful white servant cat of the Cat Kingdom.

name: Yukikaze
description: __Affiliation:__ Adventurer __Species__: Human Yukikaze is an Adventurer of the series Maou-sama, Retry! He presents as female and expresses lustful interest in Hakuto Kunai. Yukikaza is referred to as a "girlish boy".

name: Yunifer Magnolia
description: A woman who suddenly found herself in the body of Yunifer, the villainess of the original novel. She's a water mage who works at a clinic.

name: Yupa
description: Nausicaä's teacher and legendary swordsman. He's been traveling the world in search of the secret of the Sea of Corruption. (Source: nausicaa.net)

name: Yuuto Itou
description: An innocent high school otaku and best friend of [Tsutsui](https://anilist.co/character/83235/Tsutsui--Hikari). He is known for wearing cat ears on his head often causing his classmates to distance themselves from Yuuto. He is a very caring and kind person who supports Tsutsui in every way he can. Ito is very kind and cares for his friends. He is awkward when meeting new people.

name: Zenji Marui
description: He is a student at Totsuki Culinary Academyand a resident of Polar Star Dormitory. he and the other resident students from this hostel befriended with their fellow roommate/kouhai, Yukihira Soma whom also seen the amazing skill of the freshman. It is due to he rarely cooks, Zenji is considered as the weakest chef among the Polar Star Gang despite his brains has seemly possessed with infinite knowledge about cooking and black-&-white documents.

name: Zod Exarion
description: __Circle Tier Level:__ 7 (Sage) Sage of Wisdom Zod Exarion is the Master of the Tower of Magic and the one and only Seventh-Circle magician in existence. He was known as the greatest mage in the world, the man who had singled-handily revived interest in magic. He also was one of the 100 people who fought against Bhromier Napolitan and one of the six who survived the battle.
mediaTitles: A Returner's Magic Should Be Special
A Returner's Magic Should Be Special

name: Akari Hizamaru
description: __Nationality:__ Japan __Mars Ranking:__ #6 __Height:__ 177 cm __Surgery Base:__ Bagworm (Psychidae) Akari Hizamaru is a Japanese boy and a martial artist. After the death of his childhood friend, he chose to join the Annex Project to find the cure of the deadly A.E. virus that afflict the Earth. He is also one of the few people who were born Post-Surgery and inherited the Mosaic Organ. name: Akatsuki Kain
description: Aidou's cousin and another one of "Kaname-sama's right hand." His carefree attitude gets both him and Aido in trouble at times. His nickname is "Wild," despite the fact he is actually mellower than Aido. He tends to get blamed for the actions of other vampires, especially Aido, despite not being involved and ends up getting punished as a result. name: Akira
description: The series protagonist. Akira is the cool and silent type. He has grayish hair, blue eyes, and stands at 172cm tall. Likes omelet rice flavored Solids. He grew up as an orphan along with Keisuke. Akira was an undefeated champion of the street fighting game "Bl@ster", where he participated in the RAY district under the name LOST. name: Akira Agarkar Yamada
nativeName: アキラ・アガルカール・山田
description: __Height:__ 185cm A mysterious and stoic Indian prince, always accompanied by his duck named Tapioca. He and his servants spy on Haru under orders of the mysterious organization called "Duck". He transfers into Yuki's class, despite being 25 years old, and also is an experienced fisherman.
